query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A black and white close-up photograph of male genitalia with a barbell piercing, illuminated by diagonal stripes of light filtering through blinds. The subject is isolated within a soft-edged circular spotlight against a completely black background, showing skin texture and the metallic jewelry.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grainy black and white close-up of male genitalia with a barbell piercing, exhibiting heavy film artifacts and extreme exposure that crushes surrounding shadows into pure black while isolating the skin within a circular spotlight. Diagonal blind shadows stripe across the anatomy, creating atmospheric distress and an oppressive mood of isolation and unease.
